question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?animal ?operation
WHERE
{
  ?animal wdt:P31 wd:Q729 .
  ?animal p:P607 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P607 ?militaryUnit .
  ?militaryUnit wdt:P798 ?militaryDesignation .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?militaryDesignation), "Australian") .
  ?animal p:P607 ?statement2 .
  ?statement2 ps:P607 ?militaryOperation .
  ?militaryOperation wdt:P3156 ?classification .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?classification), "Australian") .
}

question.string: among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?founder ?party
WHERE {
  wd:Q8757 wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?founder wdt:P102 ?party .
  ?founder wdt:P463 ?n .
  ?n wdt:P279* wd:Q2129 .
}

question.string: among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?work ?workLabel
WHERE
{
  ?author wdt:P50 ?work .
  ?work wdt:P50 ?author .
  ?author wdt:P9687 "Yoshihiro" .
  ?author wdt:P50 ?otherwork .
  ?otherwork wdt:P31 wd:Q4746132 .
  FILTER (?work != ?otherwork)
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}

question.string: On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brooke_state ?colin_state
WHERE {
  wd:Q105751318 wdt:P569 ?brooke_birth .
  wd:Q105751318 wdt:P119 ?brooke_state .
  wd:Q105751319 wdt:P569 ?colin_birth .
  wd:Q105751319 wdt:P119 ?colin_state .
  FILTER ( ?brooke_state = ?colin_state )
}

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?
At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?
Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?
On which island is the Indonesian capital located?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?island
WHERE {
  wd:Q685 Jakarta .
  wd:Q685 wdt:P131 ?location .
  ?location wdt:P361 ?island .
  FILTER( ?island = wd:Q582 Java )
}

question.string: can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?
How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q11696 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER (?date > "1990-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?seasonsWon
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q39715 .
  ?team wdt:P1813 "Chicago Bulls" .
  ?team p:P2522 ?wonStatement .
  ?wonStatement ps:P2522 ?wonChampionship .
  ?wonChampionship wdt:P3450 wd:Q82799 .
  ?wonStatement pq:P2522 ?seasonsWon .
  FILTER (?seasonsWon >= 2)
}

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?kobeEndYear ?lebronStartYear
WHERE
{
  BIND(wd:Q125466 AS ?kobe).
  BIND(wd:Q32623 AS ?lebron).
  BIND(wd:Q160254 AS ?lakers).
  ?kobe p:P54 ?kobeStatement.
  ?kobeStatement ps:P54 ?lakers.
  ?kobeStatement pq:P582 ?kobeEnd.
  BIND(YEAR(?kobeEnd) AS ?kobeEndYear).
  ?lebron p:P54 ?lebronStatement.
  ?lebronStatement ps:P54 ?lakers.
  ?lebronStatement pq:P580 ?lebronStart.
  BIND(YEAR(?lebronStart) AS ?lebronStartYear).
  FILTER (?kobeEndYear = ?lebronStartYear)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?director ?film1 ?film2
WHERE {
  ?director wdt:P57 ?film1 .
  ?film1 wdt:P1476 "Red Notice" .
  ?director wdt:P57 ?film2 .
  ?film2 wdt:P1476 "Titanic" .
  ?director wdt:P735 "Rawson Marshall Thurber" .
}

question.string: Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?founder wdt:P112 ?company .
  ?company wdt:P1705 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING ((COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder)) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?partner ?nativeLanguage
WHERE {
  wd:Q123089 bind(wd:Q123089 as ?batman).
  ?partner wdt:P449 ?batman.
  ?partner wdt:P103 ?nativeLanguage.
  FILTER (?nativeLanguage = wd:Q1860)
}

question.string: How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190379 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  wd:Q5936 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER (?year > 2006) .
  BIND(strafter(str(?population), "T00:00:00Z") AS ?year)
  FILTER (?population > "1500000")
}

question.string: Did Joe Cocker play at the Woodstock festival?
Did Udo Bölts participate in the Tour de France?
How many of Reinhold Messner's brothers still live?
In which manner did Hemingway die?
In which industry does the House of Medici own a business?
How do people from Turkey call the official name of the united states of america?
How high is the Cologne Cathedral ?
How is the Harz called in Mandarin Chinese?
How many international airports are located within the city of Hamburg ?
On how many albums does Madonna perform?
On how many albums does Mariah Carey perform?
How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?
How many ancient civilizations are there?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q28171265 }

question.string: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?
How many All-NBA Team awards have Shaquille O'Neal and Kobe Bryant received in the same year?
How many literary works did Richard Bachman write?
How many notable works does Sarah J. Maas have?
Did Bryan Evenson work for at least one university where he was educated at?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university ?educatedAt
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q2927945 AS ?bryanEvenson)
  ?bryanEvenson p:P69 ?statement1.
  ?statement1 ps:P69 ?educatedAt.
  ?bryanEvenson p:P803 ?statement2.
  ?statement2 ps:P803 ?professorship.
  ?professorship wdt:P361 ?university.
  FILTER (?university = ?educatedAt)
}

question.string: How many children (including apopted ones) does Jeff Bezos have with his ex-wife?
How many children had Paul McCartney together with his ex-wife Linda McCartney?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?child) AS ?number_of_children)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P26 wd:Q234035.
  ?person wdt:P735 "Paul McCartney".
  ?child wdt:P22 ?person.
  ?child wdt:P25 wd:Q234035.
}

question.string: How many Chinese zodiac animals are there in total?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q48416396 }

question.string: How many cities are part of the Pearl River Delta?
How many city-states are currently in the world?
How many businesses did Steve Jobs found?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?company) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P1128 ?person .
  ?person wdt:P735 "Steve Jobs" .
  ?company wdt:P2283 ?founder .
  ?founder wdt:P735 "Steve Jobs" .
}

question.string: How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P8328 ?democracyIndex .
  FILTER (?democracyIndex > 7) .
  ?item wdt:P162 ?drivesOn .
  FILTER (?drivesOn = "left-hand traffic")
}

question.string: How many countries have never been members of the UN?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(*) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P17 ?country . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?item wdt:P208 ?un } }

question.string: How many countries are on the continent of South America ?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count) WHERE { ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q18 }

question.string: How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P4552 ?mountain_range .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER (?elevation > 2000) .
  ?country wdt:P300 ?mountain_range .
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count))

  ?item wdt:P674 wd:Q168873 .
  ?item wdt:P1074 wd:Q170225 .
  ?item wdt:P2540 wd:Q13110545 .
  ?item wdt:P3734 wd:Q8427998 .
}

How many films are derived from the original Ghost in the Shell Manga?
How many French kings didn't die of natural causes?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q838948 .
  ?item wdt:P27 wd:Q142 .
  ?item wdt:P509 ?cause .

How many different female mayors did Hamburg have?
how many head of the state does iran have?
How many scholary articles have ImageNet as a subject?
How many inhabitants does the birthplace of Cristiano Ronaldo have?
How many Japanese writers received the Nobel Prize?
How many languages are widely used in India?

How many locations has Georges Braque worked at (work location)?
How many months does winter consist of in Germany?
How many movies does the Scream franchise have?

question.string: How many movies has James Cameron directed prior to the year 2010?
How many movies were directed by Akira Kurosawa ?
How many musical scales are there?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P1880 [] . }

question.string: How many public holidays does the state Bavaria have in a year?
How many literary works besides The Picture of Dorian Gray did its author write?
How many literary works did Mark Twain write in his lifetime?
How many occupations did Mark Twain have?
how many of spiderman perfomers are citizens of the united kingdom?
how many official languages does the united states of america have?
How many official languages has Pakistan ?
How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?award) AS (?totalAwards))
WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q200868 .
  ?movie wdt:P1411 ?nomination .
  ?nomination wdt:P279* wd:Q190020 .
  ?nomination wdt:P1686 wd:Q131454 .
  BIND(?nomination AS ?award)
}

question.string: How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?
How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?

question.string: How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?
How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?
How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?
How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?play) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?play wdt:P50 wd:Q692.
  ?play wdt:P577 ?date.
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) < 1601).
  ?play wdt:P31 wd:Q179870.
}
